# OpenTelemetry Special Interest Groups

<!-- This file is auto-generated. To make changes, see CONTRIBUTING.md#updating-sig-information. -->

This page contains detailed information for all OpenTelemetry Special Interest Groups (SIGs).

## Specification SIGs

### Specification: General + OTel Maintainers Sync

- **Meeting time:** Tuesday at 08:00 PT
- **Meeting notes:** [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1pdvPeKjA8v8w_fGKAN68JjWBmVJtPCpqdi9IZrd6eEo)
- **Meeting invites group:** [calendar-spec-general](https://groups.google.com/a/opentelemetry.io/g/calendar-spec-general)
- **Slack channel:** [#otel-specification](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C01N7PP1THC)
- **Repositories:** [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification), [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto), [open-telemetry/build-tools](https://github.com/open-telemetry/build-tools)
- **Technical Committee sponsors:** [Technical Committee](./community-members.md#technical-committee)
- **Governance Committee liaison:** tbd

### Java: SDK + Instrumentation

- **Meeting time:** Thursday at 09:00 PT, and every other Thursday at 09:00 UTC+8
- **Meeting notes:** [Google Doc](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1D7ZD93LxSWexHeztHohRp5yeoTzsi9Dj1HRm7Tad-hM)
- **Meeting invites group:** [calendar-java](https://groups.google.com/a/opentelemetry.io/g/calendar-java)
- **Slack channel:** [#otel-java](https://cloud-native.slack.com/archives/C014L2KCTE3)
- **Repositories:** [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java), [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-instrumentation](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-instrumentation), [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-contrib](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-contrib), [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-examples](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-java-examples), [open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto-java](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto-java), [open-telemetry/semantic-conventions-java](https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions-java)
- **Technical Committee sponsors:** [Jack Berg](https://github.com/jack-berg) (leading)
- **Governance Committee liaison:** [Trask Stalnaker](https://github.com/trask)
